message:
You know that one friend who always panics at the slightest sign of trouble? Well, that’s my buddy Jake. The other day, we were out for a walk with our dogs when the skies suddenly turned gray, and a storm rolled in faster than I could finish my coffee. Jake started fretting about where we could find cover, how we might keep the dogs calm, and if we had enough snacks for an unexpected wait. 

I chuckled and reminded him that we’ve been through worse together—like that time we got lost on a hiking trip and had to rely on our trusty maps and a shared granola bar! 

Preparedness doesn’t have to mean being on high alert all the time; it can just be about having a plan and staying calm. I find that a little checklist of essentials helps keep my mind at ease. This little refresher helped me remember the basics when it counts! 

Do you have a friend who tends to panic, or are you the one? What’s your go-to strategy for keeping calm in a storm?
